regulations.name: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide from the People's Republic of China: Initiation of Countervailing Duty Investigation
regulations.summary: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide (CBS) is a rubber vulcanization accelerator used in industrial rubber products, including components relevant to battery manufacturing and supply chains. The initiation of a countervailing duty (CVD) investigation by the U.S. Commerce Department signals potential new tariffs on this Chinese-origin chemical input, which may raise costs or disrupt sourcing for manufacturers relying on Chinese suppliers. For secondary battery domain concerns, this reinforces the need to evaluate Chinese supplier inclusion in SCM construction and assess feedstock supply chain risks tied to U.S. trade remedy actions.
regulations.rd_impact: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide (CBS) is a rubber vulcanization accelerator used in industrial rubber products, including components relevant to battery manufacturing and supply chains. The initiation of a countervailing duty (CVD) investigation by the U.S. Commerce Department signals potential new tariffs on this Chinese-origin chemical input, which may raise costs or disrupt sourcing for manufacturers relying on Chinese suppliers. For secondary battery domain concerns, this reinforces the need to evaluate Chinese supplier inclusion in SCM construction and assess feedstock supply chain risks tied to U.S. trade remedy actions.
regulations.citation_quote: N-Cyclohexylbenzothiazole-2-Sulfenamide from the People's Republic of China: Initiation of Countervailing Duty Investigation

regulations.name: Initiation of Antidumping and Countervailing Duty Administrative Reviews (April Anniversary Dates)
regulations.summary: Commerce's initiation of AD/CVD administrative reviews for April anniversary orders signals active trade remedy enforcement that may affect Chinese battery material and component suppliers in the supply chain. Companies building SCM with Chinese entities must monitor whether specific AD/CVD orders cover battery-related inputs (e.g., anode/cathode materials, lithium compounds), as duty rate revisions from these reviews can materially shift sourcing economics. This is particularly relevant when evaluating Chinese supplier inclusion decisions and logistics cost modeling for battery passport BOM origin disclosures.
regulations.rd_impact: Commerce's initiation of AD/CVD administrative reviews for April anniversary orders signals active trade remedy enforcement that may affect Chinese battery material and component suppliers in the supply chain. Companies building SCM with Chinese entities must monitor whether specific AD/CVD orders cover battery-related inputs (e.g., anode/cathode materials, lithium compounds), as duty rate revisions from these reviews can materially shift sourcing economics. This is particularly relevant when evaluating Chinese supplier inclusion decisions and logistics cost modeling for battery passport BOM origin disclosures.
regulations.citation_quote: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) has received requests to conduct administrative reviews of various antidumping duty (AD) and countervailing duty (CVD) orders with April anniversary dates. In accordance with Commerce's regulations, we are initiating those administrative reviews.

history.note: 명칭 변경: Initiation of Antidumping and Countervai

regulations.name: Antidumping or Countervailing Duty Order, Finding, or Suspended Investigation; Opportunity To Request Administrative Review and Join Annual Inquiry Service List
regulations.summary: This notice opens the annual administrative review window for existing U.S. antidumping (AD) and countervailing duty (CVD) orders, which may include orders on battery materials and components (e.g., graphite electrodes, lithium, anode/cathode materials) sourced from China and other countries. For secondary_battery supply chain planning, any Chinese suppliers subject to AD/CVD orders will face duty rate re-determinations that could materially affect landed cost and sourcing decisions — directly relevant to the SCM 구축 시 중국 기업 포함 여부 판단 concern. Additionally, companies importing covered materials should evaluate whether to request a review to lock in or contest applicable duty rates before the deadline.

For secondary_battery supply chain planning, any Chinese suppliers subject to AD/CVD orders will face duty rate re-determinations that could materially affect landed cost and sourcing decisions — directly relevant to the SCM 구축 시 중국 기업 포함 여부 판단 concern. Additionally, companies importing covered materials should evaluate whether to request a review to lock in or contest applicable duty rates before the deadline.
regulations.citation_quote: Antidumping or Countervailing Duty Order, Finding, or Suspended Investigation; Opportunity To Request Administrative Review and Join Annual Inquiry Service List

regulations.name: 60-Day Notice of Proposed Information Collection: Application for Permanent/Temporary Export or Temporary Import of Classified Defense Articles and Classified Technical Data
regulations.summary: This notice proposes an information collection process for the export/import of Classified Defense Articles and Classified Technical Data, directly relevant to the space_environment domain's concern around export control eligibility for space-use components and materials. Organizations involved in space-related R&D that handle classified defense articles or technical data must anticipate updated compliance requirements when applying for export or temporary import permits. The 60-day public comment window (closing ~late July 2026) represents a narrow opportunity to influence final OMB-approved requirements before they become binding.
regulations.rd_impact: This notice proposes an information collection process for the export/import of Classified Defense Articles and Classified Technical Data, directly relevant to the space_environment domain's concern around export control eligibility for space-use components and materials. regulations.name: Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard No. 214; Side Impact Protection; FMVSS No. 305a; Electric-Powered Vehicles: Electric Powertrain Integrity; FMVSS No. 307; Fuel System Integrity of Hydrogen Vehicles
regulations.summary: This final rule amends FMVSS No. 307, which governs fuel system integrity of hydrogen vehicles, directly affecting hydrogen vehicle safety standards. Changes to hydrogen vehicle powertrain and fuel system regulations may influence project timelines, certification requirements, and compliance costs for hydrogen mobility initiatives. Teams tracking hydrogen subsidies and IRA 45V project timelines should note that vehicle-level safety standards form part of the broader regulatory landscape for hydrogen deployment.
regulations.rd_impact: This final rule amends FMVSS No. 307, which governs fuel system integrity of hydrogen vehicles, directly affecting hydrogen vehicle safety standards. Changes to hydrogen vehicle powertrain and fuel system regulations may influence project timelines, certification requirements, and compliance costs for hydrogen mobility initiatives. Teams tracking hydrogen subsidies and IRA 45V project timelines should note that vehicle-level safety standards form part of the broader regulatory landscape for hydrogen deployment.
regulations.citation_quote: Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard No. 307; Fuel System Integrity of Hydrogen Vehicles

regulations.name: Commission Report on Progress Towards the Union-Wide CO2 Injection Capacity Target
regulations.summary: This Commission report monitors progress toward the EU's Union-wide CO2 injection capacity target, directly relevant to green_eco's feedstock supply chain and decarbonization infrastructure concerns. While it does not impose new compliance obligations, it signals the pace of Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) infrastructure buildout in the EU, which could indirectly affect carbon-intensive manufacturing sectors — including battery and hydrogen supply chains — by shaping future carbon pricing and carbon removal obligations. The report reflects ongoing EU commitment to CCS as a climate tool, informing long-term Scope 3 and EPR strategic planning.
regulations.rd_impact: This Commission report monitors progress toward the EU's Union-wide CO2 injection capacity target, directly relevant to green_eco's feedstock supply chain and decarbonization infrastructure concerns. regulations.name: Support to Implementation of Critical Raw Materials Act (2024/1252) – Article 26 Circularity Guidance
regulations.summary: Article 26 of the Critical Raw Materials Act (2024/1252) mandates national measures on circularity, including a priority list of waste streams directly relevant to battery-grade critical raw materials (e.g., lithium, cobalt, nickel). This implementation support document shapes how member states will define collection and recycling obligations, directly affecting recycled content compliance requirements and supply chain sourcing decisions for battery manufacturers. R&D teams must prepare BOM-level traceability data and recycled-content certification pipelines in anticipation of binding national circularity measures derived from this framework.
regulations.rd_impact: Article 26 of the Critical Raw Materials Act (2024/1252) mandates national measures on circularity, including a priority list of waste streams directly relevant to battery-grade critical raw materials (e.g., lithium, cobalt, nickel). R&D teams must prepare BOM-level traceability data and recycled-content certification pipelines in anticipation of binding national circularity measures derived from this framework.

regulations.name: Annual Report on R&TD Activities of the EU and Monitoring of Horizon Europe in 2025
regulations.summary: This annual EU Commission report monitors Horizon Europe R&D activities in 2025, which directly funds and shapes research trajectories relevant to next-generation battery technologies, raw material supply chains, and recycled content standards. It signals EU-level R&D prioritization that can influence battery passport data requirements, SCM decisions regarding non-EU (including Chinese) partners, and recycled material obligation frameworks. Teams should monitor funded project outcomes as they may translate into upcoming regulatory tightening on battery materials and processing.
regulations.rd_impact: This annual EU Commission report monitors Horizon Europe R&D activities in 2025, which directly funds and shapes research trajectories relevant to next-generation battery technologies, raw material supply chains, and recycled content standards. It signals EU-level R&D prioritization that can influence battery passport data requirements, SCM decisions regarding non-EU (including Chinese) partners, and recycled material obligation frameworks. Teams should monitor funded project outcomes as they may translate into upcoming regulatory tightening on battery materials and processing.

regulations.name: 기후위기 대응을 위한 탄소중립ㆍ녹색성장 기본법 (Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act)
regulations.summary: 본 법은 탄소중립 및 녹색성장 정책의 기본 체계를 규정하며, green_eco 도메인의 Scope 3 산정, EPR 분담금, 재활용 함량 의무 등 공급망 전반에 직접적인 규제 근거로 작용할 수 있다. secondary_battery 및 hydrogen 도메인에도 간접적으로 영향을 미치며, 청정수소 정의·인증 기준 및 배터리 소재 재활용 의무 관련 하위 규정의 모법으로 기능할 가능성이 높다. 법령의 구체적 이행 조항 및 하위 고시·시행령 동향을 지속 모니터링할 필요가 있다.

regulations.name: 기후위기 대응을 위한 탄소중립·녹색성장 기본법 시행령 (Carbon Neutrality and Green Growth Framework Act Enforcement Decree)
regulations.summary: 이 시행령은 탄소중립기본법의 구체적 이행 체계를 규정하며, green_eco 도메인의 Scope 3 산정, DPP(디지털 제품 여권) 대응, 재활용 함량 의무, EPR 분담금 등에 직접적인 법적 근거를 제공할 가능성이 높습니다. 또한 청정수소 인증·보조금 적격성 기준 및 배터리 공급망 관련 탄소 감축 의무와도 연계될 수 있어 secondary_battery 및 hydrogen 도메인에도 간접적 영향이 예상됩니다. 시행령의 세부 조문 전문이 제공되지 않아 구체적 조항별 영향 분석을 위한 추가 확인이 필요합니다.
regulations.rd_impact: 이 시행령은 탄소중립기본법의 구체적 이행 체계를 규정하며, green_eco 도메인의 Scope 3 산정, DPP(디지털 제품 여권) 대응, 재활용 함량 의무, EPR 분담금 등에 직접적인 법적 근거를 제공할 가능성이 높습니다. 또한 청정수소 인증·보조금 적격성 기준 및 배터리 공급망 관련 탄소 감축 의무와도 연계될 수 있어 secondary_battery 및 hydrogen 도메인에도 간접적 영향이 예상됩니다. 시행령의 세부 조문 전문이 제공되지 않아 구체적 조항별 영향 분석을 위한 추가 확인이 필요합니다.

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 (Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: 한국의 우주개발 진흥법은 우주용 부품·소재의 국내 규제 프레임워크를 형성하며, 수출통제 적격성 및 우주 파편 경감 의무 등 space_environment 도메인의 핵심 관심사에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 우주개발 관련 기술·장비·소재의 국내 인증 및 허가 체계를 규정함으로써, 우주용 부품 조달 및 공급망 구성 시 준수해야 할 법적 기준을 제시한다. 해당 법령의 적용 범위 및 개정 내용에 따라 수출통제 적격성 판단과 우주 파편 저감 관련 의무 이행 계획에 영향을 줄 수 있으므로 지속적인 모니터링이 필요하다.
regulations.rd_impact: 한국의 우주개발 진흥법은 우주용 부품·소재의 국내 규제 프레임워크를 형성하며, 수출통제 적격성 및 우주 파편 경감 의무 등 space_environment 도메인의 핵심 관심사에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 우주개발 관련 기술·장비·소재의 국내 인증 및 허가 체계를 규정함으로써, 우주용 부품 조달 및 공급망 구성 시 준수해야 할 법적 기준을 제시한다. 해당 법령의 적용 범위 및 개정 내용에 따라 수출통제 적격성 판단과 우주 파편 저감 관련 의무 이행 계획에 영향을 줄 수 있으므로 지속적인 모니터링이 필요하다.
regulations.citation_quote: 우주개발 진흥법

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 시행령 (Enforcement Decree of the Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: This enforcement decree implements the Space Development Promotion Act in South Korea, directly governing regulations on space components, materials, and related activities — all of which fall within the space_environment domain concerns of export control eligibility, space-grade parts/materials regulation, and space debris mitigation obligations. The decree likely establishes or reinforces procedural and compliance requirements for space development programs, including licensing and standards for space-use hardware, which may restrict or condition procurement and use of certain materials or technologies. Organizations involved in space R&D must monitor this decree for specific provisions on component certification, debris mitigation mandates, and any export control alignment with Korean space law.
regulations.rd_impact: This enforcement decree implements the Space Development Promotion Act in South Korea, directly governing regulations on space components, materials, and related activities — all of which fall within the space_environment domain concerns of export control eligibility, space-grade parts/materials regulation, and space debris mitigation obligations. The decree likely establishes or reinforces procedural and compliance requirements for space development programs, including licensing and standards for space-use hardware, which may restrict or condition procurement and use of certain materials or technologies. Organizations involved in space R&D must monitor this decree for specific provisions on component certification, debris mitigation mandates, and any export control alignment with Korean space law.
regulations.citation_quote: 우주개발 진흥법 시행령

regulations.name: 우주개발 진흥법 시행규칙 (Enforcement Rules of the Space Development Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: 본 시행규칙은 한국의 우주개발 진흥법을 구체적으로 시행하기 위한 규정으로, 우주용 부품·소재의 규제 요건 및 수출통제 적격성에 직접적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 우주 파편 경감 의무 및 우주 환경 관련 기술 기준이 포함될 가능성이 높아, space_environment 도메인의 부품·소재 선정 및 프로젝트 인허가 절차에 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 한국 우주산업 참여 기업은 동 시행규칙의 구체적 조항을 면밀히 검토하여 수출통제 적격성 및 규제 준수 여부를 확인해야 합니다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 시행규칙은 한국의 우주개발 진흥법을 구체적으로 시행하기 위한 규정으로, 우주용 부품·소재의 규제 요건 및 수출통제 적격성에 직접적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 우주 파편 경감 의무 및 우주 환경 관련 기술 기준이 포함될 가능성이 높아, space_environment 도메인의 부품·소재 선정 및 프로젝트 인허가 절차에 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 한국 우주산업 참여 기업은 동 시행규칙의 구체적 조항을 면밀히 검토하여 수출통제 적격성 및 규제 준수 여부를 확인해야 합니다.
regulations.citation_quote: 우주개발 진흥법 시행규칙

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 (수소법)
regulations.summary: 이 법률은 수소경제 육성과 수소 안전관리를 위한 포괄적 법적 근거를 제공하며, 청정수소 정의·인증 기준 및 보조금 적격성에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 수소 생산·유통·활용 전반의 규제 프레임워크를 설정하므로, 청정수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 CfD 등 재정 지원 수령 요건 판단 시 핵심 준거 법령으로 작용한다. IRA 45V 착공 마감일(2028년) 대응을 포함한 프로젝트 일정 관리 및 인증 취득 전략 수립에 즉각적인 검토가 필요하다.
regulations.rd_impact: 이 법률은 수소경제 육성과 수소 안전관리를 위한 포괄적 법적 근거를 제공하며, 청정수소 정의·인증 기준 및 보조금 적격성에 직접적인 영향을 미친다. 수소 생산·유통·활용 전반의 규제 프레임워크를 설정하므로, 청정수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 CfD 등 재정 지원 수령 요건 판단 시 핵심 준거 법령으로 작용한다. IRA 45V 착공 마감일(2028년) 대응을 포함한 프로젝트 일정 관리 및 인증 취득 전략 수립에 즉각적인 검토가 필요하다.

history.note: 명칭 변경: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 (수소법)

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령
regulations.summary: 본 시행령은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 하위 규정으로, 청정수소 인증 기준·보조금 적격성·수소 안전관리 요건 등 수소 사업 전반에 직접 영향을 미친다. 청정수소 정의 및 인증 기준의 구체적 규정이 포함될 경우, 프로젝트의 보조금 수혜 적격성 및 CfD 계약 조건에 즉각적인 영향을 줄 수 있다. 2025년 12월 30일 공포·시행 기준으로, 2028년 IRA 45V 착공 마감일을 앞두고 국내 청정수소 프로젝트 타임라인 리스크 관리에 중요한 참고 규정이 된다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 시행령은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 하위 규정으로, 청정수소 인증 기준·보조금 적격성·수소 안전관리 요건 등 수소 사업 전반에 직접 영향을 미친다. 청정수소 정의 및 인증 기준의 구체적 규정이 포함될 경우, 프로젝트의 보조금 수혜 적격성 및 CfD 계약 조건에 즉각적인 영향을 줄 수 있다. 2025년 12월 30일 공포·시행 기준으로, 2028년 IRA 45V 착공 마감일을 앞두고 국내 청정수소 프로젝트 타임라인 리스크 관리에 중요한 참고 규정이 된다.
regulations.source_url: https://www.law.go.kr/법령/수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령(014015)
regulations.citation_quote: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령

history.note: enacted → in_force, 명칭 변경: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행령

regulations.name: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행규칙
regulations.summary: 본 시행규칙은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 세부 집행규칙으로, 청정수소 인증 기준·절차 및 수소 관련 시설의 안전관리 요건을 구체화한다. 수소 프로젝트의 보조금 적격성 판단 및 청정수소 정의·인증 기준 변동에 직접적인 영향을 미치며, 국내 수소 생산·공급망 운영 시 준수해야 할 규제 프레임워크를 확정한다. 2025년 10월 1일부로 시행됨에 따라, 진행 중인 수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 인허가 계획 재검토가 필요하다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 시행규칙은 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률의 세부 집행규칙으로, 청정수소 인증 기준·절차 및 수소 관련 시설의 안전관리 요건을 구체화한다. 수소 프로젝트의 보조금 적격성 판단 및 청정수소 정의·인증 기준 변동에 직접적인 영향을 미치며, 국내 수소 생산·공급망 운영 시 준수해야 할 규제 프레임워크를 확정한다. 2025년 10월 1일부로 시행됨에 따라, 진행 중인 수소 프로젝트의 타임라인 및 인허가 계획 재검토가 필요하다.
regulations.source_url: https://www.law.go.kr/법령/수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행규칙(014016)
regulations.citation_quote: 수소경제 육성 및 수소 안전관리에 관한 법률 시행규칙

regulations.name: Regulation for Federal Financial Assistance (OMB Proposed Revision)
regulations.summary: OMB's proposed revision to Federal Financial Assistance guidance introduces stricter transparency, accountability, and oversight requirements for federal grants and cooperative agreements, which directly affects hydrogen R&D projects (e.g., IRA 45V-linked programs) reliant on federal award funding. Tightened oversight rules may impose additional reporting and compliance burdens on subsidy recipients, potentially affecting grant eligibility timelines and increasing administrative overhead for projects already under time pressure from the 2028 IRA 45V construction deadline. Indirect effects may also extend to secondary battery and green/eco R&D programs that rely on federal cooperative agreements or grants for supply chain or recycled content initiatives.
regulations.rd_impact: OMB's proposed revision to Federal Financial Assistance guidance introduces stricter transparency, accountability, and oversight requirements for federal grants and cooperative agreements, which directly affects hydrogen R&D projects (e.g., IRA 45V-linked programs) reliant on federal award funding. Tightened oversight rules may impose additional reporting and compliance burdens on subsidy recipients, potentially affecting grant eligibility timelines and increasing administrative overhead for projects already under time pressure from the 2028 IRA 45V construction deadline. Indirect effects may also extend to secondary battery and green/eco R&D programs that rely on federal cooperative agreements or grants for supply chain or recycled content initiatives.
regulations.citation_quote: OMB is proposing revisions that would improve transparency, accountability, and oversight for Federal awards across the Federal Government. This includes ensuring that American tax dollars are not wasted or misused

regulations.name: Further Adjusting the Tariff Regimes for Imports of Aluminum, Steel, and Copper Into the United States
regulations.summary: Tariff adjustments on aluminum, steel, and copper imports directly affect the cost and availability of key raw materials used in battery cell manufacturing, EV structural components, and related supply chains. For secondary battery R&D and production, copper is a critical anode current collector material, and aluminum is used in cathode current collectors and cell casings — price shocks or supply disruptions from new tariff regimes will increase BOM costs and complicate supplier qualification, especially where Chinese entities are involved. Green/hydrogen projects reliant on steel and aluminum for electrolyzer stacks, balance-of-plant equipment, and structural infrastructure will also face cost escalation risks.
regulations.rd_impact: Tariff adjustments on aluminum, steel, and copper imports directly affect the cost and availability of key raw materials used in battery cell manufacturing, EV structural components, and related supply chains. For secondary battery R&D and production, copper is a critical anode current collector material, and aluminum is used in cathode current collectors and cell casings — price shocks or supply disruptions from new tariff regimes will increase BOM costs and complicate supplier qualification, especially where Chinese entities are involved. Green/hydrogen projects reliant on steel and aluminum for electrolyzer stacks, balance-of-plant equipment, and structural infrastructure will also face cost escalation risks.
regulations.citation_quote: Further Adjusting the Tariff Regimes for Imports of Aluminum, Steel, and Copper Into the United States

regulations.name: Significant New Use Rules on Certain Chemical Substances (25-2.5e)
regulations.summary: EPA's SNURs under TSCA require 90-day advance notification before manufacturing, importing, or processing designated chemical substances for any significant new use, directly impacting battery supply chain management. New or novel chemical substances relevant to battery materials (e.g., electrolytes, electrode materials, coatings) that were subjects of PMNs may fall under these rules, creating compliance obligations for sourcing and processing decisions. Companies must audit their battery material supply chains — particularly for next-generation anode/cathode materials — to determine whether any covered substances trigger SNUR notification requirements before production or import commences.
regulations.rd_impact: EPA's SNURs under TSCA require 90-day advance notification before manufacturing, importing, or processing designated chemical substances for any significant new use, directly impacting battery supply chain management. New or novel chemical substances relevant to battery materials (e.g., electrolytes, electrode materials, coatings) that were subjects of PMNs may fall under these rules, creating compliance obligations for sourcing and processing decisions. Companies must audit their battery material supply chains — particularly for next-generation anode/cathode materials — to determine whether any covered substances trigger SNUR notification requirements before production or import commences.
regulations.citation_quote: The SNURs require persons to notify EPA at least 90 days before commencing the manufacture (defined by statute to include import) or processing of any of these chemical substances for an activity that is designated as a significant new use in the SNUR.

regulations.name: Potassium Phosphate Salts From China; Institution of Five-Year Reviews
regulations.summary: Potassium phosphate salts (e.g., KH₂PO₄, K₃PO₄) are key precursor materials used in lithium iron phosphate (LFP) battery cathode manufacturing. The institution of five-year sunset reviews on antidumping/countervailing duty orders against Chinese suppliers raises the risk of continued or increased trade barriers on these inputs, directly affecting raw material sourcing strategies and SCM decisions regarding Chinese supplier inclusion. Battery passport and BOM preparation must account for potential origin-related compliance complications if these duties are revoked or extended.
regulations.rd_impact: Potassium phosphate salts (e.g., KH₂PO₄, K₃PO₄) are key precursor materials used in lithium iron phosphate (LFP) battery cathode manufacturing. The institution of five-year sunset reviews on antidumping/countervailing duty orders against Chinese suppliers raises the risk of continued or increased trade barriers on these inputs, directly affecting raw material sourcing strategies and SCM decisions regarding Chinese supplier inclusion. Battery passport and BOM preparation must account for potential origin-related compliance complications if these duties are revoked or extended.
regulations.citation_quote: The Commission hereby gives notice that it has instituted reviews pursuant to the Tariff Act of 1930, as amended, to determine whether revocation of the countervailing and the antidumping duty orders on potassium phosphate salts from China would be likely to lead to continuation or recurrence of material injury.

regulations.name: Melamine From China; Institution of Five-Year Reviews
regulations.summary: The five-year review of antidumping and countervailing duty orders on melamine from China signals continued U.S. scrutiny of Chinese chemical supply chains, which is indirectly relevant to secondary battery and green/eco domains that rely on Chinese feedstock sourcing. If duties are upheld or expanded, supply chain mapping (SCM) decisions regarding Chinese suppliers — including melamine-adjacent chemical intermediates — may be affected. This also reinforces the broader trend of U.S. trade measures targeting Chinese materials, which battery and green material teams should factor into BOM and origin-tracking preparations for Battery Passport and Scope 3 reporting.
regulations.rd_impact: The five-year review of antidumping and countervailing duty orders on melamine from China signals continued U.S. scrutiny of Chinese chemical supply chains, which is indirectly relevant to secondary battery and green/eco domains that rely on Chinese feedstock sourcing. If duties are upheld or expanded, supply chain mapping (SCM) decisions regarding Chinese suppliers — including melamine-adjacent chemical intermediates — may be affected. This also reinforces the broader trend of U.S. trade measures targeting Chinese materials, which battery and green material teams should factor into BOM and origin-tracking preparations for Battery Passport and Scope 3 reporting.
regulations.citation_quote: the Commission hereby gives notice that it has instituted reviews pursuant to the Tariff Act of 1930, as amended, to determine whether revocation of the antidumping and countervailing duty orders on melamine from China would be likely to lead to continuation or recurrence of material injury

regulations.name: In the Matter of Hans De Geetere and Knokke-Heist Support Corporation Management (Hasa Invest) – BIS Final Decision and Order
regulations.summary: This Final Decision and Order from the Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) concerns an export control enforcement action against individuals and entities in Belgium, indicating active US export control enforcement against foreign parties. This is directly relevant to the space_environment domain's concern around export control eligibility, as BIS actions of this type can restrict access to controlled US-origin goods, technology, and software — including space-grade components and materials. R&D teams sourcing US space-qualified parts or collaborating with international partners must monitor BIS denied/restricted party lists to ensure compliance and avoid supply chain disruptions.
regulations.rd_impact: This Final Decision and Order from the Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) concerns an export control enforcement action against individuals and entities in Belgium, indicating active US export control enforcement against foreign parties. This is directly relevant to the space_environment domain's concern around export control eligibility, as BIS actions of this type can restrict access to controlled US-origin goods, technology, and software — including space-grade components and materials. R&D teams sourcing US space-qualified parts or collaborating with international partners must monitor BIS denied/restricted party lists to ensure compliance and avoid supply chain disruptions.
regulations.citation_quote: In the Matter of: Hans De Geetere, Paul Parmentierlaan 121, 8300 Knokke Heist, Belgium, and Nyckeestraat 4, 8300 Knokke Heist, Belgium, Knokke-Heist Support Corporation Management, a/k/a Hasa Invest, Paul Parmentierlaan 121, 8300 Knokke Heist, Belgium, and Nyckeestraat 4, 8300 Knokke Heist, Belgium; Final Decision and Order

regulations.name: 국가연구개발혁신법 (National R&D Innovation Act)
regulations.summary: 국가연구개발혁신법은 한국 내 국가 R&D 과제의 기획·수행·평가·관리 전반을 규율하며, 차세대 배터리(리튬메탈 음극재, 전고체 등) 및 수소·우주 분야 R&D 과제에 직접 적용된다. 공급망(SCM) 구축·소재 데이터 확보·수출통제 관련 연구과제 수행 시 동법의 연구비 사용기준, 보안관리, 성과물 귀속 규정 준수가 필요하다. 특히 외국 기업(중국 포함) 참여 과제의 경우 연구협약·보안심사 절차에 추가적인 규제 부담이 발생할 수 있어 지속 모니터링이 요구된다.
regulations.rd_impact: 국가연구개발혁신법은 한국 내 국가 R&D 과제의 기획·수행·평가·관리 전반을 규율하며, 차세대 배터리(리튬메탈 음극재, 전고체 등) 및 수소·우주 분야 R&D 과제에 직접 적용된다. 공급망(SCM) 구축·소재 데이터 확보·수출통제 관련 연구과제 수행 시 동법의 연구비 사용기준, 보안관리, 성과물 귀속 규정 준수가 필요하다. 특히 외국 기업(중국 포함) 참여 과제의 경우 연구협약·보안심사 절차에 추가적인 규제 부담이 발생할 수 있어 지속 모니터링이 요구된다.
regulations.citation_quote: 국가연구개발혁신법

regulations.name: 산업기술연구조합 육성법 (Industrial Technology Research Cooperative Promotion Act)
regulations.summary: 본 법은 산업기술 분야의 연구조합 설립 및 육성을 지원하는 프레임워크로, 이차전지·수소·친환경 등 R&D 도메인과 간접적으로 관련됩니다. 연구조합을 통한 공동 R&D 참여 자격, 정부 지원 수혜 요건, 기술개발 협력 구조에 영향을 미칠 수 있으며, SCM 구축 및 차세대 배터리 기술 개발 컨소시엄 참여 시 조합원 자격 요건 검토가 필요합니다. 직접적인 수출통제·원료규제 조항은 확인되지 않으나, 국내 연구개발 협력 체계 구성 및 보조금 적격성 판단 시 간접적 영향이 예상됩니다.
regulations.rd_impact: 본 법은 산업기술 분야의 연구조합 설립 및 육성을 지원하는 프레임워크로, 이차전지·수소·친환경 등 R&D 도메인과 간접적으로 관련됩니다. 연구조합을 통한 공동 R&D 참여 자격, 정부 지원 수혜 요건, 기술개발 협력 구조에 영향을 미칠 수 있으며, SCM 구축 및 차세대 배터리 기술 개발 컨소시엄 참여 시 조합원 자격 요건 검토가 필요합니다. 직접적인 수출통제·원료규제 조항은 확인되지 않으나, 국내 연구개발 협력 체계 구성 및 보조금 적격성 판단 시 간접적 영향이 예상됩니다.
regulations.citation_quote: 산업기술연구조합법

regulations.name: 산업기술연구조합 육성법 시행령
regulations.summary: 이 시행령은 산업기술연구조합의 설립·운영·지원에 관한 세부 기준을 규정하며, 2차전지·수소·우주 등 첨단 산업 R&D 조합 활동의 법적 프레임워크를 구성합니다. 연구조합을 통한 공동 R&D 추진 시 조합원 자격, 출자 구조, 외국 기업(중국 포함) 참여 가능 여부에 대한 기준을 간접적으로 규율하여 SCM 파트너 선정 및 공동개발 계약 구조에 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 직접적 규제 의무보다는 R&D 협력 거버넌스의 제도적 틀로서 모니터링이 필요합니다.
regulations.rd_impact: 이 시행령은 산업기술연구조합의 설립·운영·지원에 관한 세부 기준을 규정하며, 2차전지·수소·우주 등 첨단 산업 R&D 조합 활동의 법적 프레임워크를 구성합니다. 연구조합을 통한 공동 R&D 추진 시 조합원 자격, 출자 구조, 외국 기업(중국 포함) 참여 가능 여부에 대한 기준을 간접적으로 규율하여 SCM 파트너 선정 및 공동개발 계약 구조에 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 직접적 규제 의무보다는 R&D 협력 거버넌스의 제도적 틀로서 모니터링이 필요합니다.
regulations.citation_quote: 산업기술연구조합법 시행령

regulations.name: REACH Regulation Article 117(3) Sixth Report – Alternatives to Animal Testing (June 2026)
regulations.summary: This report documents the EU's progress in replacing animal testing under REACH, signaling evolving chemical substance assessment methodologies that may affect how feedstock and material suppliers certify safety data for supply chains. For green_eco domain concerns, this could influence the scope and format of substance data required for DPP (Digital Product Passport) and Scope 3 emissions reporting, particularly where chemical characterization of recycled or bio-based feedstocks is involved. Indirect implications for secondary_battery are possible if battery material suppliers (e.g., electrode or electrolyte chemistries) must update their REACH substance dossiers to reflect alternative testing data standards.
regulations.rd_impact: This report documents the EU's progress in replacing animal testing under REACH, signaling evolving chemical substance assessment methodologies that may affect how feedstock and material suppliers certify safety data for supply chains. For green_eco domain concerns, this could influence the scope and format of substance data required for DPP (Digital Product Passport) and Scope 3 emissions reporting, particularly where chemical characterization of recycled or bio-based feedstocks is involved. Indirect implications for secondary_battery are possible if battery material suppliers (e.g., electrode or electrolyte chemistries) must update their REACH substance dossiers to reflect alternative testing data standards.
regulations.citation_quote: The use of alternatives to testing on animals for the REACH regulation : sixth report under Article 117(3) of the REACH regulation : June 2026
